iot.mitigationaction.ActionName.Description: The friendly name of the mitigation action.

iot.mitigationaction.ActionParams.Description: The set of parameters for this mitigation action. The parameters vary, depending on the kind of action you apply.

iot.mitigationaction.RoleArn.Description: The IAM role ARN used to apply this mitigation action.

iot.mitigationaction.Tags.Description: Metadata that can be used to manage the mitigation action.
